/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,test_package_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs/test_package_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/test_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs/_test_package_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/minibot/test_files_ros/build/test_package_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs:/home/minibot/test_files_ros/build/test_package_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs/libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
